record.field: Technical issues, bugs, and system problems
Billing questions, invoices, and payment issues
Application errors, bugs, and software problems
Internet, WiFi, and network connectivity issues
Password resets, account access, and login issues
Billing questions, invoices, payments, and account charges
Issues related to technical problems, system errors, and incidents.
Standard request for information or service.
Request for change to existing services.
Questions about products, features, or specifications.
Support related to orders, shipping, and delivery.
Issues related to invoices, payments, and billing.
Requests related to account access, profile, and settings.
Suggestions for new features or improvements.
Reports of software bugs or defects.
General questions not covered by other types.

Password Reset Guide

To reset your password, follow these steps:

  1. Go to the login page
  2. Click "Forgot Password"
  3. Enter your email address
  4. Check your email for reset instructions
  5. Follow the link and create a new password

If you don't receive the email within 5 minutes, check your spam folder.

Common Printer Issues and Solutions

Printer Not Responding

  • Check if the printer is powered on
  • Verify USB/Network connection
  • Restart the printer
  • Check printer queue for stuck jobs

Poor Print Quality

  • Check ink/toner levels
  • Run cleaning cycle
  • Align print heads
  • Replace cartridges if necessary

Paper Jams

  • Open all access panels
  • Remove jammed paper carefully
  • Check for torn pieces
  • Close all panels before resuming

Network Configuration Guide

This guide will help you configure your network settings.

WiFi Connection

  1. Open Network Settings
  2. Select WiFi from the list
  3. Enter your network password
  4. Click Connect

Ethernet Connection

  1. Connect Ethernet cable to your device
  2. Go to Network Settings
  3. Select Ethernet
  4. Configure IP settings if needed

Troubleshooting

If you experience connection issues:

  • Restart your router
  • Check cable connections
  • Verify network credentials
  • Contact IT support if problems persist

Email Account Setup

Follow these steps to set up your email account:

For Outlook

  1. Open Outlook
  2. Go to File > Add Account
  3. Enter your email address
  4. Enter your password
  5. Follow the setup wizard

For Gmail

  1. Open Gmail app or website
  2. Click Settings
  3. Go to Accounts and Import
  4. Add your email account
  5. Verify your account

Common Issues

  • Check your internet connection
  • Verify email credentials
  • Check server settings
  • Ensure two-factor authentication is configured

Software Installation Guide

This guide covers the general process for installing software on your system.

Windows Installation

  1. Download the installation file
  2. Right-click and select "Run as Administrator"
  3. Follow the installation wizard
  4. Accept the license agreement
  5. Choose installation location
  6. Complete the installation

Mac Installation

  1. Download the .dmg file
  2. Open the downloaded file
  3. Drag the application to Applications folder
  4. Launch from Applications

Linux Installation

Use your package manager:

  • Ubuntu/Debian: sudo apt install package-name
  • Red Hat/CentOS: sudo yum install package-name
  • Arch: sudo pacman -S package-name

Security Best Practices

Follow these guidelines to keep your account and data secure.

Password Security

  • Use strong passwords (minimum 12 characters)
  • Include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols
  • Don't reuse passwords across accounts
  • Change passwords regularly
  • Use a password manager

Two-Factor Authentication

Enable 2FA for all important accounts:

  1. Go to account security settings
  2. Enable two-factor authentication
  3. Scan QR code with authenticator app
  4. Save backup codes securely

Phishing Prevention

  • Never click suspicious links
  • Verify sender email addresses
  • Don't share credentials via email
  • Report suspicious emails to IT

Data Backup Procedures

Regular backups are essential for data protection. Follow these procedures:

Automatic Backups

Our system performs automatic backups daily. To verify:

  1. Go to Settings > Backup
  2. Check backup schedule
  3. Verify last backup date
  4. Test restore procedure monthly

Manual Backup

  1. Select files or folders to backup
  2. Right-click and select "Backup"
  3. Choose backup location
  4. Confirm backup completion

Cloud Backup

  • Use cloud storage services
  • Enable automatic sync
  • Verify cloud backup regularly
  • Keep multiple backup copies

VPN Setup Guide

Connect to our secure VPN network using these instructions.

Windows VPN Setup

  1. Open Network & Internet settings
  2. Click VPN > Add VPN connection
  3. Enter VPN server address
  4. Enter your credentials
  5. Save and connect

Mac VPN Setup

  1. Go to System Preferences > Network
  2. Click + to add new connection
  3. Select VPN from interface dropdown
  4. Enter server address and credentials
  5. Click Connect

Troubleshooting

  • Check internet connection
  • Verify VPN credentials
  • Check firewall settings
  • Contact IT if connection fails

Browser Troubleshooting

Common browser issues and their solutions.

Slow Performance

  • Clear browser cache
  • Disable unnecessary extensions
  • Close unused tabs
  • Update browser to latest version
  • Check available memory

Pages Not Loading

  • Check internet connection
  • Clear DNS cache
  • Try incognito/private mode
  • Disable ad blockers temporarily
  • Check firewall settings

Security Warnings

  • Verify website certificate
  • Check system date/time
  • Update browser security settings
  • Contact IT if warnings persist

Mobile Device Setup

Configure your mobile device to access work resources.

Email Setup

  1. Open Mail app
  2. Add new account
  3. Enter work email and password
  4. Configure server settings
  5. Enable security features

VPN Configuration

  1. Download VPN app from app store
  2. Enter VPN server details
  3. Configure authentication
  4. Test connection

Security Requirements

  • Enable device passcode
  • Enable remote wipe capability
  • Install security apps
  • Keep device updated
Very helpful! Solved my problem quickly.
Good article, but could use more screenshots.
Perfect guide for setting up my phone!
Cannot access email after password change
Customer reports they changed their password but now cannot log into their email. They receive an "invalid credentials" error message.
Printer not working in main office
The main office printer is showing error code E-203 and won't print. Multiple users are affected. Please send technician immediately.
Request for new user account setup
New employee John Doe needs a user account created for email, network access, and company software. Start date is next Monday.
Internet connection slow in conference room
WiFi connection is very slow in the main conference room. Meetings are being affected. Speed test shows only 2 Mbps download.
WiFi issue has been resolved. The connection is now stable and working properly. Appreciate the quick response and resolution.
Question about invoice #INV-2024-001. Customer wants to know why the amount is different from the quote provided last month.
Invoice question was answered. The explanation was helpful, though it took a bit longer than expected to get a response.
Customer requests update to latest version of the software. Standard priority ticket with 24-hour response SLA.
Software update completed successfully. The process was straightforward and the new version is working well. Thanks for the support!
Production server is down. Multiple customers affected. High priority ticket with 4-hour response SLA. Currently at risk of breaching.
Unauthorized access detected in customer database. Immediate action required. Urgent priority ticket with 1-hour response SLA. SLA has been breached.
Overdue ticket - SLA breached and still open
This demo ticket represents an overdue case where the SLA resolution deadline has already passed but the ticket is still open.
User forgot password and needs reset. Standard priority ticket with 24-hour response SLA. Created recently, not yet assigned.
General inquiry about features - Universal SLA
Customer asking about available features and pricing. Low priority ticket using universal SLA policy.
Database performance issue - Mixed SLA Status
Database queries are running slowly. High priority ticket. Response SLA met (responded within 4 hours), but resolution SLA is at risk (24 hours).
Users in the second floor report frequent disconnects from WiFi. Issue started after router reboot.
Customer paid invoice twice by mistake and requests a refund for the duplicate payment.
Request product demo and pricing details
Prospect wants a 30-minute product demo and a pricing breakdown for 50 users.
Mobile app crashes immediately after tapping Login. Reported on iPhone 14, iOS 17.2.
App crash issue has been fixed. The update resolved the problem and the app is now working smoothly on iOS. Great work!
Checkout is failing for all customers due to payment gateway errors. Immediate investigation required.
Cancelled: Duplicate ticket created by mistake
Customer confirms issue was already reported; this duplicate ticket should be cancelled.
Having trouble accessing our online portal. Getting error messages when trying to log in. Can someone help?
@acmecorp When will the new feature be available? We've been waiting for months!
Security scan detected a potential vulnerability in the authentication system. Immediate review required by administrator.
Customer requests verification that their database backups are running correctly and can be restored if needed.
Customer needs assistance configuring API integration with third-party service. Admin review required for security compliance.
API integration configuration was completed successfully. The security review process was thorough and the setup instructions were clear. Very satisfied with the support.
Discussed the detected security vulnerability and immediate action plan.
Follow-up call to confirm backup verification process and answer questions.
Confirmed backup system is working correctly. Provided documentation for restore procedures.
Provided guidance on API integration configuration and security best practices.
Configured API integration with proper security settings. Documentation sent via email.
We need urgent assistance with our account security settings. Can an administrator help us immediately?
Draft: Feature request for dark mode
Customer would like to request a dark mode feature for the application. This ticket is still being drafted.
Customer posted on Twitter complaining about slow response times and poor service quality. Need to address publicly.
Prospect wants detailed information about Enterprise plan features, pricing, and implementation timeline.
Customer reports order #ORD-2024-1234 was supposed to arrive yesterday but hasn't been delivered. Tracking shows it's still in transit.
Customer tried to pay invoice #INV-2024-0056 but payment was declined. Card is valid and has sufficient funds.
Request to update company profile information
Customer needs to update company name, address, and contact information in their account profile.
Company profile information has been updated successfully. The process was quick and all changes were applied correctly. Thank you!
Bug: Data export fails for large datasets
When exporting data with more than 10,000 records, the export fails with error "Memory limit exceeded". This happens consistently.
Customer wants to know if services are available 24/7 or only during business hours.
Service availability question was answered. The information provided was helpful, though I would have appreciated a faster initial response.
Customer wants to provide positive feedback about the excellent support they received from agent Sarah. Very satisfied with response time and solution quality.
Excellent support experience! Sarah was very responsive and helped resolve my issue quickly. The solution was clear and effective. Highly satisfied with the service quality.
Change request: Upgrade to higher plan
Customer wants to upgrade from Basic plan to Professional plan. Need to process the change and update billing.
Employee reports laptop screen flickers intermittently, especially when opening applications. Started happening after recent Windows update.
Multiple users reporting VPN connection timeouts when trying to access remote servers. Connection drops after 5-10 minutes.
Customer has a question about the API documentation. Wants clarification on authentication method.
Password reset request was successfully completed. Customer can now log in with new password.
Password reset was completed successfully. The process was smooth and I was able to log in without any issues. Thank you for the quick assistance!
Customer requesting new feature for dashboard analytics. Unassigned ticket for demo purposes.
User cannot access their account. Unassigned ticket waiting for assignment.
Question about monthly billing charges. Unassigned ticket for demo.
User needs password reset. Created today for dashboard demo.
Customer needs help installing software. Created today for dashboard demo.
Network connection problems reported. Created today for dashboard demo.
Critical bug report - SLA at risk
Critical bug affecting production. High priority ticket approaching SLA deadline.
Server performance degradation - SLA at risk
Server response times are increasing. High priority ticket with SLA approaching deadline.
Potential security vulnerability discovered. Urgent priority ticket that has breached SLA deadline.
Email configuration issue - My Tickets demo
Email client configuration problem. Assigned to demo agent for dashboard.
Hardware replacement request - My Tickets demo
Request for hardware replacement. Assigned to demo agent.
Customer disputing billing charges. Assigned to demo agent.
Sends email notification to customer when a new ticket is created
Notifies assigned agent when a ticket is assigned to them
Notifies customer when ticket status changes
Notifies customer when a new comment is added to their ticket
Notifies customer when ticket is resolved

td.style: padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;

div.p: You can view the resolution details by clicking the link below:

a.style: background-color: #28a745; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

record.field: Notifies customer when ticket is closed

td.style: padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;

div.p: If you need to reopen this ticket or have any questions, please contact our support team.

a.style: background-color: #6c757d; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

record.field: Notifies team when ticket is approaching SLA deadline

div.p: ⚠️ SLA Warning: Ticket is approaching deadline

td.style: padding: 8px; background-color: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ffc107;
padding: 8px; background-color: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ffc107;
padding: 8px; background-color: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ffc107;

div.p: Please take action to ensure SLA compliance.

a.style: background-color: #ffc107; color: #000000; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

record.field: ⚠️ SLA Warning: Ticket ${object.ticket_number} is approaching deadline
Notifies team leader and management when SLA is breached

div.p: The SLA deadline has been breached for the following ticket:

padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dc3545;

padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dc3545;

padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dc3545;

a.style: background-color: #dc3545; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

record.field: 🚨 SLA Breach: Ticket ${object.ticket_number} has exceeded SLA deadline
Notifies team when ticket priority changes
High Priority Ticket Created - Team Notification
Notifies team immediately when a high or urgent priority ticket is created

td.style: padding: 8px; background-color: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #dc3545; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dc3545;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #dc3545; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dc3545;

padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dc3545;

padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dc3545;

a.style: background-color: #dc3545; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

record.field: Live chat inquiry about product features
Customer inquired via live chat about advanced features and pricing. Needs follow-up call.
Technical support via chat - password reset
Customer requested password reset through live chat support. Account verified.
Third-party system integration created ticket via API. Webhook endpoint returning 500 error.
System monitoring tool created ticket via REST API when server CPU usage exceeded threshold.
Customer visited office in person to request replacement of damaged laptop keyboard. Physical inspection completed.
Customer came to office for help setting up their new account. Provided in-person training session.
Excellent in-person support! The staff was very helpful and patient during the setup process.
Auto-Assign Urgent Tickets to Technical Team
Automatically assigns urgent priority tickets to Technical Support team using round-robin algorithm
Automatically assigns billing category tickets to Billing team using workload-based algorithm
Assigns hardware category tickets to Technical team using skill-based algorithm
Escalates high priority tickets to urgent and assigns to technical team
Automatically adds bug tag to tickets with bug-related keywords
Automatically adds urgent tag to urgent priority tickets
Sends notification to team when ticket status changes to resolved
Ticket has been resolved. Please review and close if appropriate.
Set High Priority for Software Issues
Sets high priority for software category tickets
Posts a message when ticket is assigned to a user
This ticket has been assigned to you. Please review and start working on it.
Automatically assigns product inquiry and order support tickets to Sales team
Escalates high priority tickets that remain unassigned
Automatically sets ticket state to assigned when a user is assigned
Follow up with customer to confirm email access is working properly after password reset.
Check if technician has been dispatched to fix the printer issue.
Ticket has been in 'New' status for 24 hours. Please assign and start working on this ticket.
Ticket is approaching SLA deadline. Response time SLA expires in 30 minutes. Please prioritize this ticket.
URGENT: SLA has been breached for this ticket. Response time SLA expired 1 hour ago. Immediate escalation required.
Follow up with customer to confirm WiFi issue is resolved.
Weekly follow-up: Check if customer is still experiencing any email access issues.
Unassigned ticket requires attention. Please assign to an agent soon.
